name: Browser Credential Extraction - Password Store Access by Non-Browser Process
description: Detects browser credential extraction by non-browser processes accessing Chrome/Edge Login Data, Firefox logins.json, or cookie databases. Covers SharpChromium, HackBrowserData, LaZagne, and manual SQLite access.
query: file where event.type == "access" and (file.path : ("*Google\\Chrome\\User Data\\Default\\Login Data", "*Edge\\User Data\\Default\\Login Data", "*Firefox\\Profiles\\*logins.json", "*Firefox\\Profiles\\*key4.db")) and not process.name : ("chrome.exe", "msedge.exe", "firefox.exe", "brave.exe")
note: Alternative KQL: process.command_line: (*SharpChromium* or *HackBrowserData* or *LaZagne* or *BrowserGather* or *WebBrowserPassView*)
